strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, demonstrated through contributions to re:cinq's MCP code generators and frameworks
Strong background in building scalable, event-driven systems, evident from work on GISCollective and experience with microservices infrastructure at Sociomantic
Diverse technical expertise across multiple programming languages and technologies, including JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and experience with various web and backend technologies

response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in building complex, scalable systems and has experience with AI-agent infrastructure, making them a suitable fit for the Chief Technology Officer role in an agentic AI fintech company.
